Hero.homeDescription: I'm a 3rd year Software Engineering student at {hva}. Previously worked as a Frontend Engineer at SaaS startup {altura}, where I helped improve the workflow of bid managers and improved the usability of key parts of the platform, including through my internship research into error handling in the application. I enjoy turning ideas into functional digital products that are both user-friendly and visually appealing. I'm currently doing my minor in Visual Interface Design, where I focus on interaction design, visual design and usability.

About.title: About me
About.subtitle: My introduction
About.description: I am a Software Engineering Student at the {hva} in the HBO-ICT program. During my internship at {altura}, I worked as a Frontend Developer. There, I was involved in developing new features, fixing bugs, and improving the user experience. During my internship research, I investigated how error handling in the frontend of the application could be improved, with a focus on usability and clear feedback for users. I enjoy creating user-friendly interfaces and combining technology with UI/UX.
